text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon May 19 07:18:19 2014
New Revision: 354502
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354502
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354502/

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.1
  - Pet portlint
  
  PR:		189807
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/Makefile
  head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/distinfo
  head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/pkg-descr

Modified: head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/Makefile	Mon May 19 07:16:35 2014	(r354501)
+++ head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/Makefile	Mon May 19 07:18:19 2014	(r354502)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	doublemetaphone
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
 CATEGORIES=	textproc pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 DIST_SUBDIR=	PECL
 
 MAINTAINER=	miwi@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A PECL extension which implements the Double Metaphone algorithm
+COMMENT=	PECL extension which implements the Double Metaphone algorithm
 
 USE_PHP=	yes
 USE_PHP_BUILD=	yes

Modified: head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/distinfo	Mon May 19 07:16:35 2014	(r354501)

@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (PECL/doublemetaphone-1.0.1.tgz) = db2828e100b15a428635f88f74585bdbeeed62a76be39163ff2638da7c0fab25
+SIZE (PECL/doublemetaphone-1.0.1.tgz) = 10039

Modified: head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/pkg-descr	Mon May 19 07:16:35 2014	(r354501)
+++ head/textproc/pecl-doublemetaphone/pkg-descr	Mon May 19 07:18:19 2014	(r354502)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 The doublemetaphone extension provides an implementation of the Double Metaphone
 algorithm.
 
-WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/doublemetaphone/
+WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/doublemetaphone
